en.extract:
The rufous-tailed fantail (Rhipidura phoenicura) is a species of bird in the family Rhipiduridae. It is endemic to Java in Indonesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''rufous-tailed fantail''' ('''''Rhipidura phoenicura''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Rhipiduridae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Java]] in [[Indonesia]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
